sections.paragraph:
ἀδιάκριτος, ον (Hippocr. et al.; Polyb. 15, 12, 9; OGI 509, 8; LXX Pr 25:1; Gen 1:2 Sym.; Philo, Spec. Leg. 3, 57 al.; var. mngs. in Lghtf. on IEph 3:2.—As a human virtue also in Ptolem., Apotel. 3, 14, 29.)

① pert. to not being judgmental or divisive, nonjudgmental, not divisive, impartial (Anecd. Gr. 213, 22) Js 3:17 (the literary structure, with climax 4:11f, points strongly in this direction; cp. NRSV ‘without a trace of partiality’; Dibelius-Greeven, Hermeneia comm. ’64, 214, w. ref. to usage in Ignatius: ‘simple’ or ‘harmonious’). Sim. IEph 3:2; IMg 15. Some prefer

② pert. to not being uncertain, unwavering Js 3:17 (cp. 1:6; s. JMayor, comm. ad loc.: ‘single-minded’, ‘unhesitating’; RSV ‘without uncertainty’; but s. 1 above); ἐν ὑπομονῇ ITr 1:l.—DELG s.v. κρίνω. M-M. TW.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

var. var. = various(ly)

Lghtf. Lghtf. = JBLightfoot

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

Ptolem Ptolem , math., II a.d.—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

NRSV NRSV = New Revised Standard Version of the NT—List 6

Hermeneia Hermeneia = commentary series—List 6

comm. comm. = commentary, -aries, commentator(s)

ref. ref. = reference(s)

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

ad loc. ad loc. = ad locum (to or at the place under consideration)

RSV RSV = The Revised Standard Version of the NT—List 6

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 19
